subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken unto the Call that hath been raised from the Twin Váv's: Verily, there is none other God but Me, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین ان استمع الندآء الذی ارتفع من الواوین انه لا اله الا انا العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
